scripts.data:import: npm run data:import:json && npm run data:import:markdown
scripts.data:all: npm run data:fetch && npm run data:build && npm run data:import
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,app -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w app"
scripts.start: npm run build -w app && node server/index.mjs
scripts.test: node --test app/src/dice/engine.test.mjs app/src/compendium/mechanics.test.mjs app/src/dm/campaignState.test.mjs app/src/rules/derive.test.mjs tests/import.test.mjs tests/markdown-import.test.mjs tests/compendium-usability.test.mjs tests/data-policy.test.mjs tests/data.test.mjs tests/api.test.mjs
